plugin.name: switcher-grid
plugin._long: A plugin that shows a grid of window thumbnails when switching windows with Alt+Tab, with search and workspace indicators.

option.name: activate
option._long: Switch to the next window in the grid.

option.name: activate_backward
option._long: Switch to the previous window in the grid.

option.name: thumbnail_width
option._long: Width of each thumbnail in pixels. Height is calculated automatically.

option.name: grid_width_percent
option._long: Width of the grid as percentage of screen width.

option.name: animation_duration
option._long: Duration of the grid animation in milliseconds.

option.name: selected_alpha
option._long: Opacity of the selected window thumbnail.

option.name: show_workspace
option._long: Show workspace number on each thumbnail.
